productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers in black. Give your semi-formal outfits a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperSoft and flexible leather upper with decorative strap for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of useLight ruching where side panel is stitched to upperConcealed gusset at centre front for easy insertion of footLeather inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortPadded leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for durabilityTexturing below the forefoot Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean clothUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
